cases.title: Participant event browse exposes Previous and Next pagination controls
preconditions: At least 13 published events visible to the participant (more than default pageSize of 12)
Authenticated participant on /events browse page
steps: Navigate to participant event browse list
Verify pagination region is visible with page metadata
Click Next to advance to page 2
Verify displayed event cards update to the second page slice
cases.expected: Pagination controls include Previous and Next (or equivalent page navigation); page indicator shows current page; only one page of event cards is rendered at a time per AC-14 and page list event discovery requirements

cases.title: My registrations page uses server-driven pagination with prev/next controls
preconditions: Participant with more than 20 registrations (default pageSize)
Authenticated participant on /registrations page
steps: Open My registrations list
Confirm pagination controls and item range summary are visible
Navigate to page 2 using Next
Observe network requests during page change
cases.expected: List renders at most pageSize registration rows; prev/next controls allow page navigation; page change triggers a single paginated GET /me/registrations request with updated page parameter per page list and testing plan

cases.title: Organizer event list table exposes server pagination controls
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin with more than one page of managed events
Authenticated on organizer events list page
steps: Navigate to organizer event list (paginated table)
Verify Previous and Next pagination controls are present
Advance to the next page and confirm table rows update
cases.expected: Organizer event list uses paginated table with prev/next controls; only the current page of events is rendered client-side per AC-14 and page list event management requirements

cases.title: Organizer operational tables use shared server pagination component
preconditions: Event with registrations, waitlist, attendance, or eligibility rows exceeding one page
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope on registrations, eligibility, check-in, or audit log listing page
steps: Open each organizer operational listing (registrations, waitlist, attendance, eligibility, audit logs)
Verify each table renders pagination controls with page metadata
Navigate forward one page on at least one table
cases.expected: Each operational table exposes prev/next (or equivalent) page controls and displays only the current server page of rows; no table renders an unbounded full dataset client-side per AC-14 and page list organizer sections

cases.title: Pagination component renders page range, item range, and prev/next controls
preconditions: Pagination UI component mounted with page=2, pageCount=5, total=48, pageSize=12
steps: Render Pagination with mid-range page metadata
Inspect output for page indicator, item range text, Previous control, and Next control
cases.expected: Component displays 'Page 2 of 5', item range summary (e.g. Showing 13–24 of 48), aria-label='Previous page', aria-label='Next page', and aria-label='Pagination' per shared UI pagination contract

cases.title: My registrations listing uses single paginated API call without N+1 fan-out
preconditions: Participant with registrations across multiple events
Authenticated participant JWT
Ability to observe API calls from registrations page load
steps: Load My registrations page (page 1)
Count API requests to list endpoints during initial render
Verify participant API client calls GET /me/registrations with page and pageSize
cases.expected: Exactly one paginated GET /me/registrations call serves the list; no per-event registration fan-out or repeated fetchEvents loops per testing plan my registrations paginated scenario and AC-14 server-driven requirement

cases.title: Participant event browse passes bounded pageSize to paginated events API
preconditions: Authenticated participant on event browse page
Network inspection available
steps: Load participant event browse page
Inspect the GET /events request query parameters
cases.expected: Request includes page=1 and a bounded pageSize (default 12 per API design); response items drive rendered cards only for the current page, not the full catalog

cases.title: Organizer Staff assigned events list is paginated with page controls
preconditions: OrganizerStaff assigned to more events than one page holds
Authenticated staff user on assigned events list
steps: Open assigned events list
Verify pagination controls are present
Navigate to next page if available
cases.expected: Staff assigned events list exposes prev/next page controls and renders only the current page of events per page list organizer staff section and AC-14

cases.title: Pagination disables Previous on first page and Next on last page
preconditions: Pagination component available for unit rendering
steps: Render Pagination with page=1, pageCount=3
Verify Previous control is disabled
Render Pagination with page=3, pageCount=3
Verify Next control is disabled
cases.expected: Previous is disabled when page=1; Next is disabled when page equals pageCount; prevents navigation beyond available pages per AC-14 page control contract

cases.title: Changing event browse filters resets pagination to page 1
preconditions: Participant on event browse page navigated to page 2 or higher
Search or state filter controls available
steps: Navigate to page 2 of event browse results
Change search query or state filter
Observe pagination state and API request page parameter
cases.expected: Filter change resets displayed page to 1; subsequent GET /events uses page=1 with updated filter parameters; avoids stale page index on new result set per page list guidance

cases.title: Single-page result set hides or disables next navigation appropriately
preconditions: Listing page where total results fit within one page (totalPages=1)
Authenticated actor with access to the listing
steps: Load listing page with totalPages=1
Inspect pagination controls
cases.expected: Next control is disabled or pagination indicates no further pages; client renders all available items for the single page without attempting to fetch or render additional pages

cases.title: Organizer table page navigation preserves sort and filter context
preconditions: Organizer operational table with active search/filter and multiple pages
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin on registrations or waitlist table
steps: Apply a filter or search on the operational table
Navigate to page 2 via Next
Verify API request includes page=2 plus existing filter parameters
cases.expected: Page change retains current filter/sort query parameters; only the items slice changes; client does not reload the full unfiltered dataset into memory

cases.title: Rapid consecutive page clicks do not render overlapping unbounded row sets
preconditions: Listing page with at least three pages of data
Network throttling or request observation enabled
steps: Click Next twice in quick succession
Observe DOM row/card count during and after navigation settles
cases.expected: Rendered list length never exceeds pageSize during navigation; final view reflects the latest requested page only; no accumulation of prior page rows in the client DOM per AC-14 unbounded dataset prohibition

cases.title: Listing pages fetch one server page per view without client-side full-dataset aggregation
preconditions: Database seeded with >500 rows for a paginated endpoint used by a listing page
Authenticated actor with list access
steps: Load listing page page 1 and record response payload size
Navigate to page 2
Compare number of list items in API response to total row count
cases.expected: Each page load retrieves exactly one paginated API response with items.length <= pageSize; client never receives or renders the full >500-row dataset in a single response per AC-14 and NFR-16 single-page constraint

cases.title: ServerPaginatedTable component wires pageSize and onPageChange to parent fetch
preconditions: ServerPaginatedTable component with mock paginated data props
steps: Render ServerPaginatedTable with page=1, totalPages>1, and pageSize=20
Simulate onPageChange to page 2
Verify Pagination subcomponent receives updated page and disabled states
cases.expected: Table delegates pagination to shared Pagination component; pageSize is passed through; onPageChange callback fires with new page index enabling server-driven refetch rather than client-side slicing of a full dataset

cases.title: Pagination metadata on UI matches API envelope total and totalPages
preconditions: Listing page with known total row count exceeding one page
Authenticated actor with list access
steps: Load listing page and capture GET list API response (items, total, totalPages, page, pageSize)
Compare UI page indicator and item range text to API metadata
cases.expected: UI displays page count and item range consistent with API total and totalPages; metadata remains stable when navigating between pages per reliable client-side pagination control requirements
